pageContext.name: Stratos
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Battle Diorama Series Art Scale 1:10 line - Stratos!  From Masters of the Universe, this Stratos Art Scale Statue is limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted.  Masters of the Universe fans, don't miss your chance to add the Stratos statue to your Masters of the Universe collectibles display!
